title: Freelance (2009–2019)
body:
**Diverse high-conversion platform engineering:**  
Development of custom themes and applications focused on JavaScript interactions and HTML5/CSS3 semantic standards.

**UI/UX Design and Development for adamo.es**  
Interface engineering with SCSS/Less and JavaScript. Integration of complex logging flows with external APIs.

UI Designer at Infojobs  
Redesign of the candidate portal interface. Creation of modular HTML/CSS frameworks for the entire application lifecycle.
